progress_points.description: Meet your captain and get to know the game controls.
Meet your fellow cadets and collect the pieces needed to complete an argument.
Learn to use the argumentation engine and identify a claim in an argument.
Make contact with ancient aliens and escape the ship.
Navigate alien ruins and match topographic maps to elevation profiles.
Build a hover board and find Toppo's location by reading a topographic map.

progress_points.short_name: Getting the Band Back Together Part II
progress_points.description: Find Tera and Aryn's locations by reading a topographic map.
Navigate alien ruins to find Jasper and relate watershed size to flow rate through its main river.
Fix DANI by identifying the parts of a scientific argument.
Collect evidence to construct an argument about watershed size.
Build an argument about which watershed is bigger by supporting a claim with evidence.
Send Tera's crates back to her by identifying the direction of water flow based on a map of the watershed.
Find the source of a pollutant by predicting the spread of dissolved materials through a watershed.
Construct an argument about the location of the pollutant that includes reasoning and links a claim with evidence.
Navigate alien ruins and solve puzzles to demonstrate an understanding of how materials move through waterways.
Help Tera plant seeds in ideal locations by predicting the spread of a dissolved nutrient through a watershed.
Search for a water source in the desert and demonstrate understanding of the water table.
Explore alien ruins and demonstrate understanding of the relationship between infiltration rate and soil type.
Manipulate alien machines to demonstrate understanding of the relationship between infiltration rate and soil type.
Manipulate alien machines to demonstrate understanding of the relationship between infiltration rate and soil type. Drill a well to access the water table.
Construct a complete argument to convince Anderson to leave her base.
Demonstrate understanding of soil infiltration rates and holding capacity by helping Tera film seedlings in the ideal soil for their needs.

progress_points.short_name: If I Had a Nickel- Floors 1 & 2
progress_points.description: Solve puzzles in alien ruins using knowledge of evaporation rate and the water cycle.

progress_points.short_name: If I Had a Nickel- Floors 3 & 4
progress_points.description: Solve puzzles in alien ruins using knowledge of evaporation and condensation.
Provide a counter argument to Aryn's faulty claim using knowledge about the water cycle.
Help Aryn fix a solar still using knowledge of evaporation and condensation.
